# Compute blood aggregated signatures from individual signatures
# Last modified: 08/21/25
# Author: Kewalin Samart

##### Load libraries and sort scripts
```{r}
library(readr)
library(here)
library(tidyverse)
source(here("scripts/00_background_genes_PA_functions.R"))
source(here("scripts/01_signature_aggregation_functions.R"))
```

##### Initialize arguments
```{r}
# example argument
metadata_path = here("data/v2/signatures/RNAseq_TB_signature_run_info_blood.tsv")
direction = "dn"
bg_source = "input data" # L1000 genes
extra_arg= "_dn.tsv"
output_dir = here("data/v2/signatures/RNAseq/blood_aggregated_signatures")
threshold_pct <- 0.90
```

```{r get background genes}
data_path = here("data/v2/DE_results/RNAseq/up")
all_genes <- character(0)

data_to_run <- readr::read_tsv(metadata_path)
data_to_run <- data_to_run[data_to_run$signature == 1,]

for (i in seq_len(nrow(data_to_run))) {
  file_name <- data_to_run$SIGNATURE_NAME[i]
  file_path <- paste0(data_path,"/",file_name,"_up.tsv")

  if (!file.exists(file_path)) next

  dataset <- readr::read_tsv(file_path) %>% tidyr::drop_na()

  all_genes <- c(all_genes, as.character(dataset$GeneID))
}
bg_genes = all_genes
```
##### Compute membership matrix
```{r}
require(tidyverse)
require(dplyr)
require(readr)
data_path = here("data/v2/DE_results/RNAseq")

# 1) Make a clean, unique background table (character IDs, no dups)
bg_genes_df <- tibble(GeneID = unique(as.character(bg_genes)))
stopifnot(anyDuplicated(bg_genes_df$GeneID) == 0)

cat("Number of UNIQUE background genes:", nrow(bg_genes_df), "\n")

data_to_run <- read_tsv(metadata_path, show_col_types = FALSE)

# 2) Start the membership matrix with ONLY the background gene IDs
membership <- bg_genes_df

for (i in seq_len(nrow(data_to_run))) {
  cat("iteration", i, "\n")

  signature_name <- data_to_run$SIGNATURE_NAME[i]
  signature_filename <- paste0(signature_name, "_", direction, ".tsv")
  signature_path <- file.path(data_path, direction, signature_filename)

  cat("reading:", signature_path, "\n")
  if (!file.exists(signature_path)) next

  gene_signature <- read.delim(signature_path, sep = "\t", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

  # 3) Ensure ONE row per GeneID in the signature, keep only the column we need
  to_merge_logFC <- gene_signature %>%
    mutate(GeneID = as.character(GeneID)) %>%
    distinct(GeneID, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
    select(GeneID, log2FoldChange)

  # 4) Prepare a single-column frame named by the signature
  sig_col <- to_merge_logFC %>%
    rename(!!signature_filename := log2FoldChange)

  # 5) LEFT JOIN onto the fixed background (no row growth)
  membership <- membership %>%
    left_join(sig_col, by = "GeneID")

  # 6) Replace NA only in the newly added column (do NOT touch GeneID)
  membership[[signature_filename]][is.na(membership[[signature_filename]])] <- 0

  # 7) Safety checks every loop
  stopifnot(anyDuplicated(membership$GeneID) == 0)
  stopifnot(nrow(membership) == nrow(bg_genes_df))
  cat("rows:", nrow(membership), "cols:", ncol(membership), "\n")
}

final_sigval <- membership

# Reorder columns (GeneID first)
final_sigval <- final_sigval %>%
  relocate(GeneID)

if (!dir.exists(output_dir)) dir.create(output_dir, recursive = TRUE)
save_result = TRUE
if (save_result) {
  saveRDS(final_sigval, file = file.path(output_dir, paste0(direction, "_membership_mat.rds")))
  write_tsv(final_sigval, file = file.path(output_dir, paste0(direction, "_membership_mat.tsv")))
  cat("Saved to", output_dir, "\n")
}

gene_membership_matrix <- final_sigval
```

##### Compute jaccard matrix
```{r}
jaccard_matrix = compute_jaccard_matrix(metadata_path = metadata_path, data_path = data_path, 
                       direction = direction, output_dir = output_dir, 
                       extra_arg = extra_arg, save_result=TRUE) 
```

##### Compute aggregated signature
```{r}
aggregate_signatures(gene_membership_matrix, jaccard_matrix, output_dir, direction, threshold_pct = threshold_pct, save_result=TRUE)
```
